notes: Structured from existing markdown unit card.

book.title: The Wonderful Wizard of Oz
book.author: L. Frank Baum
book.description: Author: L. Frank Baum Grade Level: 4th Grade (Ages 9-10) Unit Length: 30 lessons (24 regular + 6 assessments) Days: 1-30 (Weeks 1-6) Theme: Hero's Journey, Courage, Friendship, Home Reading Level: Classic fantasy adventure

weeks.title: Week 1: The Cyclone & Arrival (Days 1-5)
reading: Chapters 1-4: The Cyclone, The Council with the Munchkins, How Dorothy Saved the Scarecrow, The Road Through the Forest
assessment: Weekly assessment or review day included in source card.

weeks.title: Week 2: Building the Team (Days 6-10)
reading: Chapters 5-8: The Rescue of the Tin Woodman, The Cowardly Lion, The Journey to the Great Oz, The Deadly Poppy Field
assessment: Weekly assessment or review day included in source card.

weeks.title: Week 3: The Emerald City (Days 11-15)
reading: Chapters 9-12: The Queen of the Field Mice, The Guardian of the Gates, The Great and Terrible Oz, The Search for the Wicked Witch
assessment: Weekly assessment or review day included in source card.

weeks.title: Week 4: Defeating the Witch (Days 16-20)
reading: Chapters 13-16: Dorothy the Prisoner, The Melting of the Witch, The Winged Monkeys, The Discovery of Oz the Terrible
assessment: Weekly assessment or review day included in source card.

weeks.title: Week 5: Journey Home Begins (Days 21-25)
reading: Chapters 17-20: The Magic of Oz, The Balloon, The Journey South, The Dainty China Country
assessment: Weekly assessment or review day included in source card.

weeks.title: Week 6: Home at Last (Days 26-30)
reading: Chapters 21-24: The Country of the Quadlings, Glinda Grants Dorothy's Wish, There's No Place Like Home, Home Again
assessment: Weekly assessment or review day included in source card.
